releaseNotes: v0.26.1 — Bug-fix release for the v0.26.0 intake features. (1) NDC package size now backfills onto products that were already in your catalog before v0.26.0 — previously a product that already had a dose recorded was skipped, so its package size never filled in. (2) Stock brought in through the external CSV importer no longer records today's date as its receive date when the import file carries no date of its own — those rows now correctly leave the receive date blank rather than overstating it on the DSCSA audit export. (3) The near-expiry-at-intake alert can now be turned off — the Settings near-expiry window offers an 'Off' option. (4) The near-expiry alert no longer briefly overlaps the scan-confirmation message. No database change — schema stays at v18; existing inventory is unaffected. 472 tests passing.
